{{Navbox |name = Ethnic groups in Japan |title = [[Ethnic groups of Japan]] |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |bodyclass = hlist |groupstyle =
|group1 = Prehistoric |list1 = *[[Jōmon people|Jōmon]] *[[Yayoi people|Yayoi]] *[[Toraijin|Toraijin]]
|group2 = Ancient |list2 = *[[Azumi people|Azumi]] *[[Emishi]] *[[Hayato people|Hayato]] *[[Koshibito]] *[[Kumabito]] *[[Kumaso]] *[[Kuzu]] *[[Mishihase]] *[[Okhotsk culture|Okhotsk]] *[[Saeki people|Saeki]] *[[Satsumon culture|Satsumon]] *[[Tsuchigumo]] *[[Wajin (ancient people)|Wajin]]
|group3 = Post-classical |list3 = *[[Ainu people|Ainu]] **[[Ishikari Ainu]] **[[Menasunkur Ainu]] **[[Sumunkur Ainu]] *[[Hāfu]] *[[Matagi]] *[[Ōbeikei Islanders]] *[[Ryukyuan people|Ryukyuans]] *[[Yamato people|Yamato]]
|group4 = Immigrants |list4 = *[[Arabs in Japan|Arabs]] *[[Brazilians in Japan|Brazilians]] **[[Dekasegi]] *[[Chinese people in Japan|Chinese]] **[[Thirty-six families from Min|Min]] *[[French people in Japan|French]] *[[Irish people in Japan|Irish]] *[[History of the Jews in Japan|Jews]] *[[Koreans in Japan|Koreans]] *[[Kurds in Japan|Kurds]] *[[Nivkh people|Nivkh]] *[[Oroks]] *[[Russians in Japan|Russians]] *[[:ja:日本のタタール人|Tatars]] *[[Thais in Japan|Thais]] *[[Turks in Japan|Turks]]
| group5 = Related | list5 = * [[Ethnic nationalism in Japan]]
|below = * See also: [[Japanese people]] * {{Icon|Category}} '''[[:Category:Ethnic groups in Japan|Category]]'''
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation|content=
